description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service and sets the variables CONTAINER_IMAGE (registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:latest), DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375. Add a single build job (default stage) that runs the following script commands in order: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com; docker pull ${CONTAINER_IMAGE} || true; export CACHE_FROM="--cache-from ${CONTAINER_IMAGE}"; apk add git; git checkout ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}; ./build/build.sh dist; mv dist/*.zip .; docker tag crankykernel/cryptoxscanner:builder ${CONTAINER_IMAGE}. The job uploads any *.zip files as artifacts. No additional rules or deployment steps are defined.
